properties.sqlQuery:
select ITEMDESC as PartNumber,
	FRZCOST as UnitCost,
	FRZ5 + PREVFRZ5 as LaborCost,
	FRZ3 + PREVFRZ3 as PlatingCost,
	PLANNER as PlannerCode,
	BUYER as Buyer,
	ORDPOL as OrderPolicy,
	MISCSTAT3 as CustomerSupplied,
	STDCOST as StandardCost,
	COST5 + PREVSTD5 as StandardLaborCost,
	COST3 + PREVSTD3 as StandardPlatingCost 
from ODS.Analysis.tvf_bridging__dbo__PCMFG_INV('1975-12-30')

warehouseQuery.query:
select common.part.part_number,
	common.part.reporting_series,
	common.part.reporting_series_era,
	common.part.reporting_series_weave,
	common.part.reporting_series_block,
	common.part.reporting_series_segment,
	common.part.dm_item_type,
	common.part.pcmfg_item_type 
from common.part

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (in0.OPENINGPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) THEN in1.ACCOUNTINGPLANNERCODE ELSE NULL END)
((((in0.OPENINGPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) IS TRUE) AND in1.ISBOM) OR (NULL AND ((in0.OPENINGPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) IS NOT TRUE)))

(TO_CHAR((CASE WHEN (CAST((coalesce(CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS DOUBLE), CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS INTEGER), 0)) AS DOUBLE)  IN (2 , 5 , 8 , 11)) THEN (ADD_MONTHS(ENDDATE, -1)) WHEN (CAST((coalesce(CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS DOUBLE), CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (TO_TIMESTAMP(ENDDATE))) AS INTEGER), 0)) AS DOUBLE)  IN (3 , 6 , 9 , 12)) THEN (ADD_MONTHS(ENDDATE, -2)) ELSE (ADD_MONTHS(ENDDATE, -3)) END), 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PLANT END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PARTNUMBER END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.FACILITY END)
(CASE WHEN (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PARTNUMBER END)

condition.expression: ((NOT (FILEDATE <= (TO_DATE(CAST('2023-01-08' AS STRING), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH2424:MI:SS.FF4')))) OR ((FILEDATE <= (TO_DATE(CAST('2023-01-08' AS STRING), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH2424:MI:SS.FF4'))) IS NULL))

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (TRANSACTIONTYPE IS NULL) THEN '_Null_' ELSE TRANSACTIONTYPE END)

properties.script:
import pandas as pd

df = in0.copy()
group_cols = ["PartNumber", "Facility", "Plant"]
pivot_col = "TransactionType"
agg_dict = {"Quantity": "sum", "_dummy_": "max"}
col_to_alias = {"Quantity": "Sum", "_dummy_": "_dummy_"}
df["_dummy_"] = 1

df_pivoted = pd.pivot_table(
    df,
    index=group_cols,
    columns=pivot_col if pivot_col else None,
    values=list(agg_dict.keys()),
    aggfunc=agg_dict,
)

if col_to_alias:
    if isinstance(df_pivoted.columns, pd.MultiIndex):
        new_cols = []
        for i in range(len(df_pivoted.columns)):
            pivot_val = df_pivoted.columns.get_level_values(-1)[i]
            val_col = df_pivoted.columns.get_level_values(0)[i]
            alias = col_to_alias.get(val_col, val_col)
            new_cols.append(f"{pivot_val}_{alias}")
        df_pivoted.columns = new_cols
    else:
        alias = list(col_to_alias.values())[0] if col_to_alias else ""
        df_pivoted = df_pivoted.rename(columns={c: f"{c}_{alias}" for c in df_pivoted.columns})

df_pivoted = df_pivoted.reset_index()


return df_pivoted

properties.sqlQuery:
select ITEMDESC as PartNumber,
	FRZCOST as UnitCost,
	FRZ5 + PREVFRZ5 as LaborCost,
	FRZ3 + PREVFRZ3 as PlatingCost,
	PLANNER as PlannerCode,
	BUYER as Buyer,
	ORDPOL as OrderPolicy,
	MISCSTAT3 as CustomerSupplied,
	STDCOST as StandardCost,
	COST5 + PREVSTD5 as StandardLaborCost,
	COST3 + PREVSTD3 as StandardPlatingCost 
from ODS.Analysis.tvf_bridging__dbo__PCMFG_INV('1975-12-30')

expression.expression: CAST((((((((OPENINGBALANCE + PURCHASED) + PRODUCED) + SOLD) + ISSUED) + ADJUSTED) + TRANSFERREDIN) + TRANSFERREDOUT) AS INTEGER)

properties.script:
assert ( in0.filter(col("StartDate") >= col("FirstDate")).count() > 0 )
assert ( in0.filter(col("EndDate") <= col("LastDate")).count() > 0 )
assert ( in0.filter(col("StartDate") <= col("EndDate")).count() > 0 )

expression.expression: CAST((((WAREHOUSEONHANDBALANCE + BENTECONHANDBALANCE) + WIPONHANDBALANCE) + CONSIGNEDONHANDBALANCE) AS INTEGER)

properties.server: X:\ADW\Operations\Material Management\Material Reconciliation\Accounting Transaction Type Schema.yxdb

warehouseQuery.query: X:\ADW\Operations\Material Management\Material Reconciliation\Accounting Transaction Type Schema.yxdb

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (in0.CLOSINGPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) THEN in1.ACCOUNTINGPLANNERCODE ELSE NULL END)
((((in0.CLOSINGPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) IS TRUE) AND in1.ISBOM) OR (NULL AND ((in0.CLOSINGPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) IS NOT TRUE)))
(CASE WHEN (PLANT IS NULL) THEN '' ELSE PLANT END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PLANT END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PARTNUMBER END)
(CASE WHEN (((in0.FACILITY = in1.FACILITY) AND (in0.PLANT = in1.PLANT)) AND (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER)) THEN NULL ELSE in1.FACILITY END)
in1.* EXCLUDE("ACCOUNTING TRANSACTION TYPE", "BASE TRANSACTION TYPE")
(CASE WHEN (in0.PARTNUMBER = in1.PARTNUMBER) THEN NULL ELSE in1.PARTNUMBER END)

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN (in0.PREVIOUSQUARTERPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) THEN in1.ACCOUNTINGPLANNERCODE ELSE NULL END)
((((in0.PREVIOUSQUARTERPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) IS TRUE) AND in1.ISBOM) OR (NULL AND ((in0.PREVIOUSQUARTERPLANNERCODE = in1.PLANNERCODE) IS NOT TRUE)))
CAST((((WAREHOUSEONHANDBALANCE + BENTECONHANDBALANCE) + WIPONHANDBALANCE) + CONSIGNEDONHANDBALANCE) AS INTEGER)
CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(STARTDATE AS string), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF4')) AS DATE)
CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(ENDDATE AS string), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF4')) AS DATE)
